description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to publish packages to PyPI when a specific version tag is pushed. The workflow should have three jobs: build, publish, and release. The build job should run on ubuntu-latest, set up Python 3.x, install build dependencies, create packages with python -m build, and archive the packages. The publish job should depend on build, download the packages, and publish them to PyPI. The release job should create a GitHub release with a changelog.
